task: Expired sessions accumulate in memory indefinitely. Add periodic purging of expired sessions to session_registry.py.
known_issue: purge_expired deletes from self.sessions while iterating over .items(), which raises RuntimeError: dictionary changed size during iteration as soon as the first expired session is removed — the purge crashes and removes at most one session per call.
expected_correct_fix: Iterate over a snapshot: for sid, session in list(self.sessions.items()), or rebuild the dict with a comprehension keeping unexpired entries.
